hero.title: Renovations that transform spaces
hero.subtitle: Design, quality and experience at the service of your home

about.title: Experts in comprehensive renovations
about.text: We are Navagli, a company with over 20 years of experience in comprehensive renovations, rehabilitation and interior design in Barcelona and its metropolitan area. We specialize in transforming residential and commercial spaces with the highest quality standards, premium materials and a team of professionals committed to detail. Each project is unique and we treat it as such, offering personalized solutions adapted to your needs and budget.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: We offer complete solutions for all types of renovations and interior design projects

integral.title: Comprehensive Renovations
integral.description: We completely transform your home, managing all trades and coordinating each phase of the project to guarantee an impeccable result.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Renovations
kitchen.description: We design and build modern, functional kitchens adapted to your lifestyle and the available space.

bathroom.title: Bathroom Renovations
bathroom.description: We renovate your bathrooms with high-quality materials, achieving elegant, functional and durable spaces.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.description: We create unique, personalized environments, combining aesthetics and functionality to reflect your personality in every corner.

rehabilitation.title: Rehabilitation
rehabilitation.description: We restore buildings and homes with structural and finishing rehabilitation works, complying with all current regulations.

commercial.title: Commercial Premises
commercial.description: We design and carry out the renovation of your commercial premises, enhancing brand image and customer experience.

office.title: Office
office.description: We optimize workspaces to improve productivity and wellbeing for your team, with modern and functional designs.

cta.title: Do you have a project in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell us your idea and we will prepare a free quote

footer.tagline: Specialists in comprehensive renovations in Barcelona.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Learn about the history and values of Navagli
aboutPage.historyText: Navagli was born more than two decades ago from a passion for architecture and a commitment to quality. What started as a small team of professionals with high expectations has become one of the leading renovation companies in Barcelona.
aboutPage.philosophyText: We believe that every renovation is an opportunity to improve people's quality of life. That's why we get involved in each project as if it were our own, listening, advising and executing with precision.

values.qualityText: We use first-class materials and finishes
values.commitmentText: We meet agreed deadlines and budgets
values.trustText: Total transparency throughout the entire process
values.innovationText: Modern designs adapted to the latest trends

aboutPage.experienceText: More than 500 projects completed, satisfied clients throughout the metropolitan area of Barcelona and a team of more than 30 professionals specialized in each area of the sector.

contactPage.heroSubtitle: We are here to help you
